text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's my day off, so I decide to go<n>watch an
off-campus marathon for<n>inspiration...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Marathon Director
text_block_list.text: And the winner iiiis... NICE NATURE!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Phew! I finished off strong!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, thanks... You came to watch,<n>huh?
choice_data_list: Yep. So I guess you felt like racing?
Yep. So I guess you felt like racing?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. Do you remember what<n>Palmer told me
before?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to try that whole "escape the<n>ordinary"
thing she suggested.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look around... Not all these<n>participants are from
the academy. I<n>figured that racing against new
faces<n>might feel kind of refreshing...

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Dang it! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But that was so incredible, Nature! I<n>hope I can
beat you someday!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, I know how you feel, but I'm<n>not so sure
we stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Your specialty's short races, right?<n>Why don't
you just stick to those?

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No way! I won't give up! I can'tgive up! I've got this feeling insideme that I can't ignore...

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I will win someday! My heart, mybody, and my soul are all crying outfor victory!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Her heart... is crying out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect! I had the win<n>in the bag!
But that darn Teio just had<n>to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Dang it, dang it, dang it! I can'tbelieve this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. I guess I felt the same way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's because she hasn't given up<n>that she's
frustrated and eager to<n>win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I get it now... That's why when I lost<n>to Teio, I felt
so...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-nothing! Anyway!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... My face's burning uphere... Guess I didn't realize I wasthis stubborn...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Um, hey. Can I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose you know any tricks<n>people can
try to, you know, cool their<n>heads?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Out of the blue, she asks me for<n>advice. And what
comes to mind in<n>the moment is...
choice_data_list: Going for a run might clear your mind.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you think I should get some<n>sugar to calm
down? Nice idea!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm gonna go all in! Who cares<n>about a little
heartburn?!<n>Rub-a-dub-dub, bring on the grub!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, ma'am, I'd like a<n>chocolate carrot. Oh,
and a fanfare<n>soda, please!

text_block_list.name: Candy Store Owner
text_block_list.text:
Here ya are, Natie! Your sweet<n>tooth's really
acting up today, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's just been one of those days! So,<n>any other
recommendations?

text_block_list.name: Black-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Nature! Sweet stuff always hits<n>the spot after a
hard day of work,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa! You're those racers from<n>before!

text_block_list.name: Candy Store Owner
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Do y'all know Natie?

text_block_list.name: Long-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes! We ran together in today'smarathon! Nature was so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, now... If you keep that up...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My face is gonna burn up just as I<n>was starting to
cool down!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite all her fussing, Nice Nature<n>ends up with
some sweet treats and<n>even sweeter friends.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it. But that sounds a little like<n>a line out of
a sports movie or<n>something.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But sure! I'm in! That's exactly what<n>I need right
now!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... That was harderthan the marathon.
choice_data_list: I didn't think you'd be running till sunset.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Well, me neither. Surprised<n>even myself
there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But all that running sure set things<n>straight up
there in the old noggin.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing. A little something<n>just occurred to
me is all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just figured... I'm actually pretty<n>good at running,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a clear head, it looks like she's<n>gained a little
confidence.
